payload.tierLabel: Ready to fully integrate rich experience into GALE systems
payload.tierDesc: Strong evidence of advanced application, automation depth, and reliable quality controls

c1: I use AI for quick drafting and first-pass outputs
I provide structured prompts with role, audience, and constraints
I regularly use AI with documents or data as part of real work
I use AI in recurring workflows across projects
I connect AI to other systems, tools, or automations
responses.c2: I catch some issues, but not consistently
c3: Check specific facts, tone, or accuracy
Verify against original sources before using anything
s1: Given AI specific examples before asking it to generate something similar
Assigned AI a role or persona (e.g., “Act as a senior editor...”)
Created a reusable prompt template you use more than once
s2: Pasted raw data (spreadsheet, CSV) into AI for analysis
Asked AI to synthesize multiple messy sources into a usable brief with recommendations
Used AI-generated output to create a deliverable you shared with others
s3: Used AI as a regular part of a recurring workflow
Connected AI to other tools through an automation platform
Written code that calls an AI API
Built a custom tool or app powered by AI
